1|/**

     3| * GET /api/ivx/video-platform/home-feed (same source of truth as the landing
     4| * page and iOS app):
     5| *
     6| *   Featured Deal 1–3 → 1 Featured Project Video → Deal 4–6 → 1 video → repeat.
     7| *
     8| * Deal blocks render the rich TrustDealCard when the deal exists in the local
     9| * jv_deals cache; otherwise a compact card built from the canonical payload
    10| * (name, city, phase, investment, ROI, min investment, progress %, View Deal

    87|export default function InvestorFirstFeed({ jvDeals, jvDealsLoading, isXs, cardWidth, openQuickBuy }: {

    89|  jvDealsLoading: boolean;

   125|        investment_amount: d.totalInvestment ?? null,
   126|        expected_roi: d.expectedROI != null ? String(d.expectedROI) : null,
   127|        min_investment: null,
   128|        progress_percent: null,
   129|        photo_url: null,
   130|        url: `https://ivxholding.com/?deal=${d.id}#deals`,
   131|        is_featured: false,
   132|        priority: 0,
   133|        display_order: null,
   134|        created_at: d.createdAt ?? null,
   135|      },
   136|    }));
   137|  }, [homeFeedQuery.data?.blocks, jvDeals]);
   138|
   139|  const goToDeal = (dealId: string) => {

   144|
   145|  return (
   146|    <View style={styles.section}>
   147|      <View style={[styles.header, { paddingHorizontal: padH }]}>
   148|        <View style={styles.titleRow}>
   149|          <Sparkles size={isXs ? 16 : 18} color={Colors.primary} />
   150|          <Text style={[styles.title, { fontSize: isXs ? 16 : 18 }]}>Featured Deals</Text>

   154|          <Text style={styles.liveBadgeText}>Investor First</Text>
   155|        </View>
   156|      </View>
   157|
   158|      {isLoading ? (
   159|        <View style={[styles.loadingBox, { marginHorizontal: padH }]}>
   160|          <ActivityIndicator size="large" color={Colors.primary} />
   161|          <Text style={styles.loadingText}>Syncing live deals...</Text>
   162|        </View>
   163|      ) : blocks.length === 0 ? (

   165|          <Landmark size={32} color={Colors.textTertiary} />
   166|          <Text style={styles.emptyTitle}>No deals available yet</Text>

   171|          {blocks.map((block) => {
